title: TOMY LSI PACMAN handheld electronic game
description: A handheld electronic video game "PUCK MAN" from 1981, a conversion of the famous Pac-Man game. Due to the very limited (mobile) computing power of the time, the complexity of the gameplay was significantly reduced in comparison to the Arcade game or the version for Atari 2600. See here for some further information.
author: うぃき野郎
attribution_md:
TOMY LSI PACMAN handheld electronic game
A handheld electronic video game "PUCK MAN" from 1981, a conversion of the famous Pac-Man game. Due to the very limited (mobile) computing power of the time, the complexity of the gameplay was significantly reduced in comparison to the Arcade game or the version for Atari 2600. See here for some further information.
